toolDefinition.name: getHealthStatus
toolDefinition.description:
Health check

Returns API health status. Used by container orchestration and load balancers.

type.description: Room type key (e.g. standard, deluxe, suite)
type.title: Type

q.description: Free-text search across name, city, country, and description
q.title: Q

max_price.description: Maximum nightly price (USD) across any room type
max_price.title: Max Price

min_price.description: Minimum nightly price (USD) across any room type
min_price.title: Min Price

toolDefinition.name: searchHotels
toolDefinition.description:
Search hotels

Search and filter hotels across all cities. Returns hotel summaries (without full reviews). All filters are optional and combine with AND logic. Use `q` for free-text search across name, city, country, and description.

bodySchema.description: Full hotel details including rooms, reviews and contact info.
bodySchema.title: Hotel

type.description: Room type key (e.g. standard, deluxe, suite)
type.title: Type

toolDefinition.name: getHotelById
toolDefinition.description:
Get hotel details

Returns full hotel details including room types, reviews, and contact information.

toolDefinition.name: getHotelReviews
toolDefinition.description:
Get hotel reviews

Returns all guest reviews for a specific hotel.

toolDefinition.name: listBookings
toolDefinition.description:
List bookings

Returns a list of bookings.

bodySchema.description: Request body to create a new booking.
bodySchema.title: BookingCreate

toolDefinition.name: createBooking
toolDefinition.description:
Create a booking

Create a new hotel room booking. The total price is automatically calculated from the room type nightly rate and stay duration. Validates hotel existence, room type, dates, and guest capacity.

toolDefinition.name: getBookingById
toolDefinition.description:
Get booking details

Returns full details of a specific booking by its reference ID.

bodySchema.description: Request body to modify an existing booking. All fields optional.
bodySchema.title: BookingUpdate

toolDefinition.name: updateBooking
toolDefinition.description:
Update a booking

Modify an existing booking. Only confirmed bookings can be updated. Send only the fields you want to change. The total price is automatically recalculated if dates or room type change.

toolDefinition.name: cancelBooking
toolDefinition.description:
Cancel a booking

Cancel an existing booking. Only confirmed bookings can be cancelled. Returns the updated booking with status 'cancelled'.

response.name: Transform Headers
response.description: Add backend response status to headers
